version_description: Powerful mid career pop-rock masterpiece from Tina here. Please follow the record to understand the pace of these changes as there are many passing chords and nuances. Tina’s phrasing really sets each section apart. Intro is a bit of a decrescendo falling into the first verse. D chord at the end of verse 1 is arpeggiated. The first pre-chorus sets up the arpeggio figure for most of the rest of the song, though this can be strummed or finger picked with a groove that feels good to you. The second line of interlude 2 is a decrescendo similar in feel to the intro figure. Bridge and refrain really contain a heavy funk influenced feel. The D and D6sus2 from refrain to chorus 3 are each held and really lift things up for the explosion about to happen. Outro plays as chorus 3 repeating to fade with many ad-libs.

versions.version_description: I have included the full lyrics to celebrate her life and struggles., R.I.P Tina...

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Whats Love Got To Do With It

content:
*RIP Tina, Queen of all you surveyed... never be another


This tab is meant to represent the original album track as heard here: https://youtu.be/AdmDuTBTnlg


Chord voicings relative to capo:

D5: XX023X
D7sus2: XX0210
C/D: XX0010
D6sus2: XX0200
Dsus2: XX0230
D: XX0232
G/D: XX0003
G6/D: XX0000
Gmaj7/D: XX0002
Dsus4: XX0233
Gadd2/D: XX0203



[Intro]
[ch]D5[/ch]
[ch]D7sus2[/ch] [ch]C/D[/ch] [ch]D6sus2[/ch] [ch]Dsus2[/ch]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Dsus2[/ch]            [ch]G/D[/ch]  [ch]G6/D[/ch]
 A prisoner of your love[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Dsus2[/ch]       [ch]G/D[/ch]  [ch]G6/D[/ch]
 Entang-led in your web[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]   [ch]Dsus2[/ch]           [ch]G/D[/ch]   [ch]G6/D[/ch]
Hot whispers in the night[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Dsus2[/ch]         [ch]G/D[/ch]  [ch]G6/D[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
 I'm cap-tured by your spell,  captured[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab]           [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]Dsus2[/ch]     [ch]G/D[/ch]    [ch]G6/D[/ch]
Oh yes I'm touched by this show of e-motion[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]Dsus2[/ch]       [ch]G/D[/ch]
Should I be fractured by your lack of dev-otion[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus 1]
[tab][ch]Gmaj7/D[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]Gadd2/D[/ch]
 Should  I[/tab]
[tab][ch]G/D[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch]
 Should  I[/tab]


[Chorus 1]
[tab][ch]G/D[/ch]      [ch]Gmaj7/D[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch]
 Oh, you better be good to me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gadd2/D[/ch] [ch]G/D[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Dsus4[/ch]
 That's how it's gotta be now[/tab]
[tab][ch]G/D[/ch]    [ch]G6/D[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]Dsus2[/ch]            [ch]G/D[/ch]
 Cause I don't have no use for what you loosely call the truth[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Gmaj7/D[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch]
And you better be good to me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gadd2/D[/ch]   [ch]G/D[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]Dsus4[/ch]
 Yeah you better be good[/tab]


[Interlude 1]
[ch]Gadd2/D[/ch] [ch]G/D[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]G/D[/ch] [ch]G6/D[/ch]
[tab][ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]Gadd2/D[/ch] [ch]G/D[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]                       [ch]G/D[/ch]
                       Come on, come here, be good to me[/tab]


[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Dsus2[/ch]           [ch]G/D[/ch]   [ch]G6/D[/ch]
 I think it's also right[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Dsus2[/ch]         [ch]G/D[/ch]   [ch]G6/D[/ch]
 That we don't need to fight[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]Dsus2[/ch]    [ch]G/D[/ch]  [ch]G6/D[/ch]
We stand face to face[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]    [ch]Dsus2[/ch]            [ch]G/D[/ch]  [ch]G6/D[/ch]
 And you present your case[/tab]


[Verse 4]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]Dsus2[/ch]               [ch]G/D[/ch]     [ch]G6/D[/ch]
Yes I know, you keep telling me that you love me[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]      [ch]Dsus2[/ch]                [ch]G/D[/ch]
 And I really do want to be-lieve[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus 2]
[tab][ch]Gmaj7/D[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]Dsus4[/ch]        [ch]Gadd2/D[/ch] [ch]G/D[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
 But did you think I'd just ac-cept you in blind faith[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]Gadd2/D[/ch]  [ch]G/D[/ch]           [ch]Gmaj7/D[/ch]
 Oh,  sure babe, anything to please you[/tab]


[Chorus 2]
[tab][ch]G/D[/ch]      [ch]Gmaj7/D[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch]
 But you better be good to me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gadd2/D[/ch] [ch]G/D[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Dsus4[/ch]
 That's how it's gotta be now[/tab]
[tab][ch]G/D[/ch]    [ch]G6/D[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]Dsus2[/ch]       [ch]G/D[/ch]
 Cause I don't have the time for your over loaded lines[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Gmaj7/D[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch]
You better be good to me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gadd2/D[/ch]   [ch]G/D[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]G/D[/ch] [ch]G6/D[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]
 Yeah you better be good,           good to me[/tab]


[Interlude 2]
[ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]Gadd2/D[/ch] [ch]G/D[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]G/D[/ch] [ch]G6/D[/ch]

[tab][ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus2[/ch] [ch]D6sus2[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]
         Be good to me[/tab]

[ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]Gadd2/D[/ch] [ch]G/D[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]G/D[/ch]


[Bridge]
[tab][ch]G6/D[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Dsus4[/ch]         [ch]Gadd2/D[/ch]   [ch]G/D[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
 And I really don't see, why it's so hard to be, good to me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dsus4[/ch]    [ch]G/D[/ch] [ch]G6/D[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]Dsus4[/ch]           [ch]Gadd2/D[/ch] [ch]G/D[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch]     [ch]G/D[/ch]
 And you know, I don't under-stand, why it's your plan,    that you can't be, good to me[/tab]
[tab][ch]G6/D[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]Dsus4[/ch]         [ch]Gadd2/D[/ch] [ch]G/D[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch]     [ch]G/D[/ch]
 What I can't feel I surely cannot see,     why can't you be, good to me[/tab]
[tab][ch]G6/D[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]Dsus4[/ch]         [ch]Gadd2/D[/ch] [ch]G/D[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch]     [ch]G/D[/ch]
 And if it's not real I do not wish to see,    why don't you be, good to me[/tab]


[Refrain]
[tab][ch]G6/D[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch]     [ch]Gadd2/D[/ch]
 Why can't you be, good to me[/tab]
[tab][ch]G/D[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch]     [ch]G/D[/ch]
 Why can't you be, good to me[/tab]
[tab][ch]G6/D[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch]     [ch]Gadd2/D[/ch]
 Why can't you be, good to me[/tab]
[tab][ch]G/D[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch]     [ch]G/D[/ch]
 Why can't you be, good to me[/tab]
[tab][ch]G6/D[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch]     [ch]Gadd2/D[/ch]
 Why can't you be, good to me[/tab]
[tab][ch]G/D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]G/D[/ch]  [ch]G6/D[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
 Be good,      be  good to me[/tab]


[Chorus 3]
[tab][ch]D6sus2[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]Dsus2[/ch]            [ch]G/D[/ch]
 Cause I don't have no use for what you loosely call the truth[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G6/D[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]Dsus2[/ch]       [ch]G/D[/ch]
And I don't have the time for your over loaded lines[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Gmaj7/D[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch]
So you better be good to me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gadd2/D[/ch]   [ch]G/D[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]G/D[/ch]
 Yeah you better be good[/tab]
[tab][ch]G6/D[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch]  [ch]Gadd2/D[/ch]
Better good to me[/tab]
[tab][ch]G/D[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]G/D[/ch]

And you better be good to me,          be good to me[/tab]
